title: ancylanthos glabrescens
intro: Ancylanthos glabrescens, also known as the white-leafed ancylanthos, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Ancylanthos glabrescens include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as diarrhea and fever. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, teas, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
